rulings.Case Title: JENNIFER KORBIN ET AL VS. JASON CHOW ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion To: 1) Compel The Continued Deposition Of Richard Raskin; 2) Reopen Discovery For Limited Purpose; And 3) For The Award Of Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 3, 2017, line 2. PLAINTIFFS JENNIFER KOBRIN and NOEL VAN HARMONSON's Motion To: 1) Compel The Continued Deposition Of Richard Raskin; 2) Reopen Discovery For Limited Purpose; And 3) For The Award Of Monetary Sanctions OFF CALENDAR. Moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.7B and Court's February 24, 2017. No courtesy copies of the motion provided. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JENNIFER KORBIN ET AL VS. JASON CHOW ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To: 1) Compel The Continued Deposition Of Richard Raskin; 2) Reopen Discovery For Limited Purpose; And 3) For The Award Of Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 3, 2017, line 2. PLAINTIFFS JENNIFER KOBRIN and NOEL VAN HARMONSON's Motion To: 1) Compel The Continued Deposition Of Richard Raskin; 2) Reopen Discovery For Limited Purpose; And 3) For The Award Of Monetary Sanctions OFF CALENDAR. Moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.7B and Court's February 24, 2017. No courtesy copies of the motion provided. Additionally, this motion was filed on February 27, 2017 in violation of CCP 1005 and Court's February 24, 2017 order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ADA SORTO ET AL VS. WEDGEWOOD, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions, And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 3, 2017, line 4. DEFENDANT WEDGEWOOD (ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS "WEDGEWOOD, INC.")'s Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Transferred to Department 301 to be heard on March 17, 2017 at 9:00 a.m. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to department 301 by March 8, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date and department. = (501/REQ)

DEFENDANT HUANG YING SHAO's Motion To Reconsider And Revoke The Monetary Sanction Award On Deft'S Mtn To Compel Discovery Responses DENIED. rulings.Case Title: EQUITY GROWTH ASSET MANAGEMENT VS. DAVID LEE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 3, 2017, line 6. PLAINTIFF EQUITY GROWTH ASSET MANAGEMENT's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER OFF CALENDAR. Plaintiff is seeking summary judgement against Defendants Lee and Sam. Defendant Lee has not filed an answer, this motion is premature. CCP 1170.7 = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SALLY LIU VS. WENDY HENRIQUEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 3, 2017, line 7. DEFENDANT WENDY HENRIQUEZ's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Sustained without leave to amend. Per Plaintiff's opposition, Plaintiff served the Defendant with a "3 Day Notice to Pay or Quit" personally on January 27, 2017 demanding payment of rent, an act inconsistent with Plaintiff's allegations of termination of tenancy pursuant to a previously served notice. = (501/REQ)
